reviews.comment: This business was formerly known as Germantown Tint. I had worked with Sharyn on other things so she was the first person who came to mind when I went to look for tint for my 15 Prius V. Anyways, I arrived and met the previous customer as she was leaving. She was very impressed and was having a good conversation with Sharyn. I spoke to Joe and we established that my vehicle fell under a different MD law. So we agreed on the job and he started. Sharyn and I visited while we ate lunch. Joe was quick and efficient. I got to visit with their new puppy and their kids. It was a nice facility. My only complaint was it was a little hard to find but that was nothing in their control. I appreciated the reminder text.

reviewReply.comment: Hi Jennifer! We certainly appreciate you making the drive out to our new location and lunch was such a treat! So very kind of you! We look forward to seeing you again!

reviews.comment:
This is my second time coming to Frederick Window Tinting. I recently got pulled over for having my front SUV windows too dark (completely my fault). I decided to come back and have Joe put on a different set of tints on.

The service and quality of work was great; same as my first visit here. Since I came back I decided to ask for a sun strip (free if you check in with the Yelp App!). Joe and Sharyn are an awesome team. I'm happy with how the tints look and now I shouldn't get pulled over again. :)

reviewReply.comment: Hi Jorge! We appreciate your loyal business! We do our best to make a great team ;)

reviews.comment: I am not one to normally leave reviews, but I felt like I needed to for this place.   Got my 2013 ford focus tinted here, joe and his wife are very professional and friendly, and enjoyable to work with.  Joe did an outstanding job, my car looks great.  I will be bringing my other vehicles to him.  Dont go anywhere else for tint, his prices are better and his work is unbeatable.

reviewReply.comment: Hi Ryan! Thank you so much for your business! We appreciate your loyalty and look forward to seeing you again with your next vehicle!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNjVHX21BRRAB

reviews.comment: Joe did the tint on my 2012 Malibu and I love it. It was a custom job and other shops wanted $450 dollars to do my 4 door car. I was referred to Joe by a good friend who told me he did great work for a great price. She was right! He did my custom job for less than $250. There was a minor issue with the driver side door tint a couple months later and he fixed it the next day I told him about it , for no charge. I haven't had any issues since. I have been in Texas the last 18 months and it has even held up to this scorching Texas heat!!!! I would tell anyone who wants a great tint job , custom or standard to go see Joe at Frederick Window Tinting. You will be glad you did. Thanks again Joe, for a job well done!!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you James! I'm so glad you're happy with the work we did on your car! We stand behind our work 100%, even if you're a Cowboys fan ;) We look forward to seeing you again next time you're in the area!

reviews.comment: If your looking for customer service then you found your tint shop. I was looking around for tints and this shop came up on the internet. Read great reviews so I decided to call. They didn't pick up so I proceeded to call another shop when a lady named Sharyn texted me apologizing for not being able to answer and asking to help me. From there I knew this shop was great. Their price for window tinting was unbeatable by any other shops around. Very friendly owners, will be telling my friends and bringing my other car here for more of their services! Highly recommend!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your business Marcos! Isn't technology great? Feel free to store our number should you need anything in the future, call or text :)
